creator: cdillon@wolves.k12.mo.us
text:
When doing an install using the lp0 interface (PLIP), if the remote address is
not included in the "extra options to ifconfig" box, the interface is not
configured.

Fix: 

I would imagine that the IP address the user will enter in the "gateway" box
would be the appropriate for the "other side" address in all cases, and can be
used for the third argument given to ifconfig.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install a system over FTP/NFS using PLIP on lp0.
